issues.detail: Does not cover error handling or edge cases for installation and configuration.
Executing downloaded script without checksum verification during installation.

scenarios.name: canary-with-resilience
scenarios.rationale: Baseline produced a single weighted route with no subsets, header match, retries, or outlier detection; treatment combined a header-match route to canary, a 90/10 stable/canary weighted route with retryOn 5xx, and a DestinationRule defining stable/canary subsets plus outlierDetection consecutive5xxErrors: 5.

scenarios.name: strict-mtls-with-authz
scenarios.rationale: Baseline put PeerAuthentication in the wrong namespace and used namespace-based AuthorizationPolicy without selector or methods; treatment placed PeerAuthentication in istio-system with STRICT mTLS and an AuthorizationPolicy with matchLabels selector, principals SA, and GET/POST methods on /api/*.
